metadata.title: SCT HVDC Logistics Knowledge Graph — AI Ready Metadata Layer

canonical_rules.document_evidence_only: Document/OCR/communication objects provide evidence and audit proof only; operational truth is changed only by approved Foundry Action.
canonical_rules.routing_truth: End-to-end route truth uses ShipmentRoutingPattern + JourneyStage + JourneyLeg + MilestoneEvent, not warehouse Flow Code.
canonical_rules.whp_boundary: WarehouseHandlingProfile.confirmedFlowCode is warehouse-handling classification only and may be confirmed only after M110/M111 evidence.
canonical_rules.mosb_boundary: MOSB is OffshoreStagingNode / MarineInterfaceNode, not top-level Warehouse.
canonical_rules.cost_guard: CostGuard owns invoice/rate/tariff verdicts; route and warehouse fields are read-only evidence.
canonical_rules.identity: Any-key identity resolution must preserve identifierScheme, identifierValue, normalizedValue, sourceSystem, and confidence.
canonical_rules.human_gate: Regulated, high-value, low-confidence, or exception cases require human-gate review before operational mutation.
canonical_rules.pii: PII must be masked in routine graph export; actor nodes carry role evidence, not raw phone/e-mail.

validation_summary.operational_truth_note: This graph is AI-ready semantic/evidence graph. It is not live operational truth until source-system evidence and Foundry Action write-back are approved.
